attacking_style: Extremely long-range attacks (200km solo, 4+ hour breakaways) launched early in stages, often kilometer zero. Targets hard, attritional stages where peloton conserves energy. Late attacks typically 3km from finish on final climbs when terrain suits.
team_tactics: Minimal team support — operates independently in breakaways. Occasionally sacrifices own chances to assist teammates (stringing out peloton for KRON). Manages team morale through KOM jersey pursuits when leaders struggle.
terrain_preference: Catalunya-style hard parcours with sustained climbing (30km+ ascending). Strong on long grinding efforts but vulnerable on steep explosive finishes. Possesses unusual diesel TT power for breakaway specialist. Struggles on category-2 climbs when GC riders engage.
vulnerability: Lacks explosive acceleration on steep finishes despite breakaway success. Finishing speed deficit in sprint situations. Dropped when GC contenders ride tempo on category-2+ climbs. Energy conservation essential — cannot sustain multiple high-intensity efforts.
key_patterns: Extreme endurance specialist: multiple 200km+ solo breakaways and 4+ hour efforts (3 observations)
Catalunya specialist: 5+ stage wins there, exploits race's attritional profile systematically (5 observations)
KOM jersey hunter via breakaways, not pure climbing strength, uses energy conservation tactics (6 observations)
Psychologically manipulates breakaway companions before late solo attacks, superior positioning over power (3 observations)
Attacks at kilometer zero or goes late at 3km, avoiding mid-stage accelerations (4 observations)
Veteran craftiness: manages workload in breaks, monitors power profiles to time accelerations (3 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2022 Giro win ended three-year drought, but 2023 shifted to pure domestique role. Still competitive in breakaways but tactical role evolved beyond personal results.
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 3
